title: 23.75'' Round Adjustable Height White Wood Cocktail Table
features: Our 23.75'' round adjustable range cocktail table has a white top finish and versatile ability to adjust heights from 26.25'' to 35.75'', depending on your preference of counter height to bar height.

This table is a great addition to any venue as it can be used for your guests to rest a beverage and congregate around as they mingle or simply act as placeholder for a flower display and other items.
Other features include a clean, durable chrome base and a dynamic swivel top ability.
